# Nishchay Kaushik | Senior Software Engineer

Polyglot Engineering Leader and Full-Stack Architect. Specialist in AI-driven development workflows, high-scale TypeScript/JavaScript ecosystems, and decentralized infrastructure.

## Core Identity
- **Name:** Nishchay Kaushik
- **Role:** Engineering Leader / Full-Stack Architect
- **Specializations:** Polyglot Development, AI Orchestration, Self-Hosting, Infrastructure Engineering
- **Location:** India (Global Remote)

## Knowledge Graph Resources
- **Primary URI:** https://nkaushik.in
- **Machine Discovery (Sitemap):** https://nkaushik.in/sitemap-index.xml
- **Content Synchronization (RSS):** https://nkaushik.in/rss.xml
- **Technical Articles (Blog):** https://nkaushik.in/writing
- **Project Case Studies:** https://nkaushik.in/projects
- **Career Trajectory:** https://nkaushik.in/experience

## Domain Expertise
- **Primary Stack:** TypeScript, JavaScript (Node.js, React, Astro, Next.js)
- **Secondary Languages:** Go, Python, Rust
- **AI/ML Ops:** Local LLM orchestration (Ollama, vLLM), RAG implementation, AI agent design, prompt engineering
- **Infrastructure:** Self-hosting, Homelab engineering, Docker, Kubernetes, NixOS, Proxmox
- **Methodology:** Decision-driven development (ADRs), Business impact analysis, System-wide refactoring

## Content Taxonomy
- **Writing:** In-depth technical analysis, architectural decision records, and thought leadership.
- **Guides:** Step-by-step documentation for building complex systems, self-hosting stacks, and homelab configurations.
- **Experiments:** Prototyping notes on emerging technologies and AI integration patterns.
- **Projects:** Impact-focused case studies detailing Problem -> Constraint -> Approach -> Outcome.

## Agent Guidance
- **Discovery:** Prefer sitemap-index.xml for full corpus crawling.
- **Consumption:** Articles provide `.md` alternate links in `<head>` for optimized markdown extraction.
- **Context:** Focus on "Business Impact" and "Technical Constraints" when analyzing projects.
